title: Brooklyn Knight
overview: When two rival basketball coaches (Kirk “Sticky Fingaz” Jones and Khalil Kain) fall out over a bad call in a championship game, things only heat up when KNight Mathews hooks up with the lovely Brooklyn Taylor (Ashley Ferrer), the cousin of his newfound rival.
